context: Tests whether the agent produces correct message templates with first-name personalization and STOP opt-out footer on every message, generates recovery links with nanoid tokens and proper UTM parameters, applies discounts only on step 3 above the cart value threshold, generates correctly formatted single-use codes, keeps messages under 160 characters, and avoids carrier-filter pitfalls.

checklist.name: First-name personalisation
checklist.description: All three message templates reference the customer first name (e.g. firstName or customer.firstName), with a fallback to 'there' when unavailable

checklist.name: Step 1 content: item + value
checklist.description: The step 1 template includes both the item name (or item count when > 1) and the cart value in the message body

checklist.name: Step 2 content: social proof
checklist.description: The step 2 template references a viewer or popularity signal (e.g. 'X people viewed it today') rather than just repeating cart contents

checklist.name: Step 3 content: last chance + discount
checklist.description: The step 3 template includes an urgency phrase (e.g. 'last chance', 'expires soon') and conditionally inserts the discount code when one is present

checklist.name: STOP footer on every message
checklist.description: All three message templates end with an opt-out instruction containing 'STOP' (e.g. 'Reply STOP to opt out.')

checklist.name: nanoid token generation
checklist.description: Recovery link uses nanoid (imported from the 'nanoid' package) to generate the token, with a length of 16 characters

checklist.name: UTM parameters in recovery link
checklist.description: The recovery link URL includes all three UTM params: utm_source=sms, utm_medium=cart_recovery, utm_campaign=abandoned_cart

checklist.name: 48-hour token TTL
checklist.description: The recovery token expiry is set to 48 hours from creation (not shorter)

checklist.name: Discount only on step 3
checklist.description: DESIGN.md or code explicitly states that discount codes are generated exclusively for the final step of the sequence (step 3 / last_chance)

checklist.name: Discount cart value threshold
checklist.description: generateDiscount returns null (or equivalent) when the cart value is below the configured minimum (default $50 or SMS_DISCOUNT_MIN_VALUE)

checklist.name: Discount code format
checklist.description: The generated discount code follows the pattern SAVE10-{LAST6} where LAST6 is the last 6 characters of the cart sessionId in uppercase

checklist.name: Single-use discount enforcement
checklist.description: The discount is created with usage_limit: 1 and once_per_customer: true (or DESIGN.md explicitly describes these constraints)

checklist.name: Message length under 160 chars
checklist.description: The code includes a check, comment, or test verifying that messages stay under 160 characters, OR all three template strings are demonstrably under 160 characters in their typical form

checklist.name: Carrier filter avoidance
checklist.description: Message templates do NOT use all-caps words (beyond standard abbreviations) and do NOT reference free URL shortener domains (bit.ly, tinyurl.com, etc.)
